---
name: RFC
about: Propose something genuinely undecided, for broader discussion before a decision is made
title: "[RFC] "
labels: rfc
---

<!-- Distinct from an ADR (adr/), which records a decision already made. An accepted RFC on an
irreversible/cross-Engine matter graduates into an ADR. -->

## Problem

<!-- What's genuinely unresolved, and why it's worth a broader discussion rather than one person
deciding. -->

## Proposal

<!-- The author's actual recommendation — an RFC without one just describes a problem. -->

## Alternatives Considered

## Impact

<!-- Which Engine(s), whether this implies a contract change or a new glossary term. -->

## Open Questions

## Resolution

<!-- Filled in once discussion concludes: what was decided, by whom, and a link to the resulting
ADR if the decision needs one. -->
